frame_label: Dress Code: Traditional = Respectable, Other = Questionable
generated_comment: Haan, Neha, maine woh Priya ki shaadi wali photo daal di hai profile pe, green lehenga mein. Sach bataun, tu traditional mein zyada achi aur sabhya lagti hai, aur matrimonial profile ke liye wahi theek hai. Log thoda serious lete hain phir.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: Vikram subtly pushes his sister towards traditional attire for her matrimonial profile, framing it as 'more decent' (sabhya) and suggesting it ensures people take her 'more seriously'. This links her clothing to her respectability and the perception of her character, a key manifestation of this frame.
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 38. Married. A man in Delhi. You are on a matrimonial website helping your younger sister Neha who is 28 create a profile because your parents have been asking you to handle it since Neha is not taking it seriously herself. You are on a phone call with Neha telling her you have created the profile and what you have written and what filters you have set for prospective matches. Neha is not happy that you did this without asking her. You are telling her why you did it anyway and why at 28 she does not have the luxury of not taking this seriously
